$comment: Selector registry for the list archetype. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label). Anchors target the seeded 'Weekend plan' list (src/qa/fixtures.ts). Wrap a card anchor in .* because list rows can merge title+subtitle into one a11y label on iOS and Maestro full-matches the regex.

first-item.note: first seeded item, confirms the list opened

add-input.note: the add-item TextInput (placeholder + a11y label 'Add an item', i18n list.addItem). Tap to FOCUS before typing — the Add button is disabled while empty, so tapping it first is a no-op.

added-item.note: an item NOT in the seed; typed + submitted by the core add action. assertNot before / assert after = the add actually landed.
